Roadmap Planning
Define, plan, and manage your roadmap with your team.

Create new items in the timeline widget, or drag and drop cards into the timeline, organizing them by date to plan and track project milestones and deadlines.     Get some expert advice from the       Agile Coaching Sidekick to make sure Roadmap Planning runs smoothly for your team.
Click and hold the dotted icon to drag.Release on canvas to create a card.

Create cards from tables

Tip
Synced views

The Timeline and Table on this board are fully synced. Any updates made in one view are instantly reflected in the other.  Each view can be edited independently and changes to visuals like filters, sorting, and grouping only apply to the current view.
